channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Waste, 27th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 26/04/26 09:11 Commercial Waste/Recycling Lat/Long - 51.4179937, -0.0742214 what3words - knee.design.bands Nearest address - Flat 1, 46A, Anerley Hill, Anerley, London, SE19 2AE Foxes tearing up rubbish regularly. Needs to be a better solution to rubbish. Reference - 5518904 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 26/04/2026 09:10 Foxes tearing up rubbish regularly. Needs to be a better solution to rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall near Sainsbury’s

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning, 27th April
item.description:
Hello, I have witnessed our street cleaner attend this morning and they have done a very poor job, leaving litter which was there prior to their arrival. Papers have blown into my property due to the amount of litter left on our street. This needs to be properly cleaned immediately. We live adjacent to a high street so attract a lot of littering behaviour. When people note a street is littered they are inclined to drop litter and this causes us great difficulty. We have a number of the 22 homes which house children who play together on our streets. This is unacceptable.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roper Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th April
item.description:
Graffiti tags on wall on Creek Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intersection of goods way and Pancras road, 27th April
item.description:
Light has been permanently stuck on red in all directions for more than ten minutes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pancras Road, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th April
item.description:
Graffiti on brick wall under blue railings on Church St

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berthon Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees to be added, 27th April
item.description:
The whole of Brayards road has trees along it except this end section. It would make the streets a lot nicer to have trees along this stretch too, can this please be investigated
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Brayards Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th April
item.description:
Graffiti on grey box near Berthon St on Church St

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berthon Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins always left on street, 27th April
item.description:
Bins on this stretch of road and the other side of the road are always left out. Can the requirement for bins to be kept in properties be enforced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Brayards Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 27th April
item.description:
Email received 25/04/26 11:26 Abandoned Vehicle Lat/Long - 51.4112927, -0.0606313 what3words - brand.bottom.ample Nearest address - 55 Jasmine Grove, Penge, London, SE20 8JY White Nissan Primastar van parked on private property. We need it moved so that we can put scaffolding up. Reference - 5517267 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 25/04/2026 11:25 White Nissan Primastar van parked on private property. We need it moved so that we can put scaffolding up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jasmine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated teaffic bollard missing, 27th April
item.description:
Illuminated traffic center island bollard sign not replaced after car hit metal railings. Was a combined left and right arrow i believe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish alongside half of Whittington Road, 27th April
item.description:
Half of Whittington road covered in rubbish probably spread by foxes. Been there the whole morning. Please fine people who dispose of rubbish improperly. Demotivating for normal people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110, Whittington Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 27th April
item.description:
Flytipped mattress left for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vigilant Close, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking by a business, 27th April
item.description:
The person operating this vehicle parked illegally and when members of the public told him such and how they are fed up of people like him doing such when they pay for parking. This alerted me as it was happening just outside the property I rent and got me annoyed how he was shouting. He walked off to some business down the road after being warned by the public, at which point I took photos of his illegal parking. This goes on a lot with businesses around here and needs to be dealt with. This all happened after 9am on 27/4/26

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brick Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin, 27th April
item.description:

Again Reference - 5516860 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 25/04/2026 09:20 Overflowing bin. Again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash strewn all over., 27th April
item.description:
Trash everywhere. Busted over flowing black bags. Green bins not to be collected till next Friday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 27th April
item.description:
Dead fox close to kerbside outside of 13 Francis Road. Animal is covered up as close to school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Francis Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 27th April
item.description:
Bins are broken and had a sticker stating not to use, no replacement bins given so broken bins have been used and overflowing, bins are suppose to be emptied weekly but are not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broxburn Court, Chafford Hundred, South Ockendon
Report on FixMyStreet
